name: zvideo_dd_run_directdraw_device_enumeration
description: zVideo_dd::RunDirectDrawDeviceEnumeration logs the enumeration banner, calls DirectDrawEnumerateA with the recovered callback, reports failures, and returns a boolean success flag.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 28 unmasked mismatches after masking 24 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 56 bytes and the VC object body is 64 bytes with 8 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed failure is call setup and branch/register scheduling drift around printf, the DirectDrawEnumerateA import provider, and zVideo_dd::ReportError.
The native smoke calls the real provider-backed enumeration wrapper and verifies that it returns the recovered boolean domain without depending on local graphics hardware availability.
